title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_stash_push
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_stash_push' MCP tool.

workspaceRoot.description: Repo path. Default: first MCP root / cwd.

includeUntracked.description: Include untracked files in the stash (`git stash push -u`).

keepIndex.description: Keep staged changes in the index after stashing (`git stash push --keep-index`).

paths.description: Scope the stash to specific paths, relative to git root (must resolve within repo root).
